title: Crispy Hazelnut Crumble Bao
description: A Chinese-inspired dessert featuring a crispy hazelnut crust and crumble topping on soft bao.
instructions: Cut the crispy wonton wrappers into small pieces and toast them in the oven for 5 minutes.
In a bowl, mix together the toasted wonton pieces, flour, and granulated sugar.
Cut the hazelnuts into small pieces and mix them with the crumble topping.
Cut the soft bao dough into small pieces and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle the toasted wonton mixture and hazelnut crumble mixture on top of the bao pieces.
Drizzle the unsalted butter over the toppings.
Bake the bao in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes or until the tops are golden brown.
Serve the crispy hazelnut crumble bao warm or at room temperature.
